_comment: Starter loop policy. JSON does not support comments, so guidance lives in _comment fields that the current loop config loader ignores.

limits._comment: max_attempts is per slice; agent_timeout_s is the per-agent call timeout.

roles._comment: The first attempt for each slice. Use a writable generator runner.
roles.name: implementer

roles._comment: Reviewer must use a different runner than implementer for evaluator/generator separation.
roles.name: reviewer

roles._comment: Retry role used after failed verification or review.
roles.name: fix

verification._comment: Replace this with the deterministic command for your repo, for example: cargo test --workspace.

review._comment: per_slice controls whether reviewer runs after each passing verification; required blocks progression on failed review.

publication._comment: Maximum changed lines permitted in a single published slice.
